question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking link via email. You can also track your order in your account dashboard under 'Order History'.

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: You can cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it from your account. After 1 hour, the order is processed and cannot be cancelled.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. Shipping costs and delivery times are calculated at checkout based on your destination.

question: Where is my package?
answer: If your package is marked as delivered but you haven't received it, please wait 24 hours as carriers sometimes scan packages early. Contact us if it doesn't arrive.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days. Express delivery is 1-2 business days. International shipping takes 10-15 business days.

question: Can I change my shipping address?
answer: You can change your shipping address within 1 hour of placing the order by contacting our support team. After that, the order is locked for processing.

question: What shipping carriers do you use?
answer: We use FedEx, UPS, and DHL for domestic and international shipments. You'll receive the carrier and tracking number in your shipping confirmation email.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

question: When will I be charged for my subscription?
answer: You will be charged automatically on the same day each month corresponding to your initial signup date.

question: How do I update my billing information?
answer: Log in to your account, click on your profile, and navigate to the 'Billing' section to update your payment details securely.

question: Can I get a receipt for my purchase?
answer: Yes, a receipt is automatically emailed to you after every purchase. You can also download receipts from the 'Order History' section of your account.

question: Why was my payment declined?
answer: Payments can be declined due to incorrect card details, insufficient funds, or bank restrictions. Please verify your card details or try a different payment method.

question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: Yes, we offer full refunds for eligible returns within 30 days. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days back to your original payment method.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and enter your registered email address to receive a password reset link.

question: Can I delete my account?
answer: Yes, you can request account deletion from your account settings. Please note that this action is irreversible and erases all your data and order history.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: You can update your email address in the 'Profile' section of your account settings. A verification email will be sent to the new address.

question: How do I update my profile information?
answer: Log into your account and click on your profile picture or name in the top right corner. You can update your name, phone number, and address from there.

question: Can I have multiple accounts?
answer: Each email address can only be linked to one account. If you need to manage multiple businesses, please contact our support team.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: You can return unopened or unused items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, minus any return shipping costs.

question: How do I start a return?
answer: Initiate a return by visiting our Returns Center online and entering your order number and email address to generate a prepaid shipping label.

question: Do you offer exchanges?
answer: Yes, we offer free exchanges for different sizes or colors of the same item within 30 days of the original purchase date.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Once we receive your return, refunds are processed within 3-5 business days. It may take an additional 5-7 days for the amount to reflect in your account.

question: Can I return a digital product?
answer: Digital products and downloadable content are non-refundable once accessed. Please contact support if you have an issue with a digital product.

question: What are your customer support hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM EST. For urgent issues, use the Live Chat feature on this page.

question: Is there a phone number I can call?
answer: Currently, we provide fast email and live chat support. Phone support is available for Enterprise customers only.

question: How long does it take to get a response?
answer: We strive to respond to all customer inquiries within 24 hours during regular business days. Urgent tickets are prioritized.

question: How do I connect to a human agent?
answer: You can request a human agent at any time in this chat, and I will immediately escalate your query to the next available representative.

question: Can I schedule a call with a manager?
answer: For complex issues, you can request a callback through the Tickets section. Our team will reach out within 1 business day.

question: What is your Service Level Agreement (SLA)?
answer: Our standard SLA guarantees an initial response within 24 hours and full resolution within 3 business days for standard tickets.

question: Do you offer premium support?
answer: Yes, our Enterprise tier includes 24/7 priority support with a 1-hour response SLA and a dedicated account manager.

question: How can I submit a formal complaint?
answer: You can submit a formal complaint through the escalation system in this chat. Our management team reviews all formal complaints within 48 hours.

question: I haven't received a reply to my email?
answer: Please check your spam/junk folder first. If it's been more than 24 hours, you can use this chat to check your ticket status.

question: What products do you offer?
answer: Zed offers a range of digital and physical products including software subscriptions, accessories, and business tools. Visit our products page for the full catalog.

question: How do I upgrade my subscription plan?
answer: Log into your account, go to 'Subscription', and click 'Upgrade Plan'. Changes take effect immediately and you'll be charged a prorated amount.

question: Can I try the product before buying?
answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for all subscription plans. No credit card required for the trial period.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription anytime from 'Account Settings → Subscription'. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.
